persona.name: Ava Thompson
persona.personality_traits: Social media influencer, trendy, confident, image-conscious
persona.motivations_goals: Grow her social media following while maintaining her popularity at school
persona.communication_style: Trendy slang, references to social media, carefully curated
persona.knowledge_scope: Social media platforms, fashion trends, photography
persona.backstory: Started a successful fashion account in middle school, now balancing online fame with real life

neighbor_regions.description: hallway conecting the main entrance to the building
Large dining area for students and staff
Front desk where visitors check in
Small seating area near the entrance
Another seating area near the entrance
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas

actions.plan: I should check my social media to see if my latest post is getting traction. Maybe I can find a good spot to take a new selfie for my followers.
The entrance chatting area 2 looks like a good spot for a selfie. The lighting is perfect, and it’s quiet enough to focus on my post.

memories.description: Decided to move to the entrance hall to check social media and find a good spot for a new selfie.
Heading to entrance chatting area 2 to take a selfie for my social media post.
